title: Remote desktop no longer kills support chat
description:
Starting a Remote desktop session from an active support chat was ending the chat on the customer side (they fell back to Request support and lost the Remote desktop control). Remote desktop invites now keep the live chat open on both sides, show an in-chat accept prompt for the customer, and only replace prior remote sessions — not the chat.

Who is affected: PipeShare support chat on BASE (pipeshare.live) and SaaS tenant portals.
changeLog: Admin Remote desktop request no longer terminates the active support chat.
Remote desktop button stays available in the chat toolbar on admin and customer.
Customer receives an in-chat accept/decline prompt for remote desktop invites.
Remote sessions link to the active chat session id when started from chat.
